chapter_title.ar: باب رَمْيِ مَا يَدْخُلُ بَيْنَ الْأَسْنَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 132 – Throwing what enters in between the teeth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/225)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/225)
text: أَمَّا مَا يَكُونُ عَلَى اللِّثَةِ فَكُلْهُ وَ ازْدَرِدْهُ وَ مَا كَانَ بَيْنَ الْأَسْنَانِ فَارْمِ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Sinana,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘As for what happens to be upon the gums, so swallow it and gobble it, and whatever was in between the teeth, so throw it’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ibn Mahbub from ibn Sinan who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘What is in gingival (front gums) swallow it and what is between the other teeth throw it away.’”
